raw_consumer_statement:
I bought a round trip ticket from XXXX for my wife to travel to XXXX ( XXXX ) to visit her family. Her return date was XX/XX/2024. XXXX cancelled her flight and rebooked her on XXXX XXXX for XX/XX/2024. Then they cancelled her flight and rebooked her on XXXX XXXX for XX/XX/XXXX. She was not allowed to fly out of XXXX by the ticket agent because the XXXX at XXXX was shut down and they didn't want her to be stranded in XXXX. XXXX rebooked her again on Turkish Airline for the XX/XX/2024. On XX/XX/2024 I went to get her seats assigned. That is when I found out that they also have cancelled her booking on that flight. That was the XXXX cancellation by the airline. This is when my wife 's patience came to an end. There were flights in and out of XXXX and XXXX was unable to provide us with a service that we paid for. On XX/XX/2024 I went online and was able to get her a ticket with XXXX XXXX for XX/XX/2024 so she could come home. 

I disputed XXXX charges for the amount of {$1100.00} that I had to pay XXXX XXXX because they could not provide the service that I had paid for. 

After a lengthy back and forth with Citi Cards I only got a partial credit and refused to let me present my case to XXXX. 

Attached are all the documents. All from XXXX.
